title: CLI main() must pass frequency= to build_regime_dossiers (post-B0154 regression)
why: B0154 rewrote the standalone CLI call site in phase5/regime_stats.py (~L665) and dropped frequency=args.frequency to build_regime_dossiers. Standalone `python -m phase5.regime_stats` for an H4 asset then computes effective_n with the D1 divisor (off by the H4 bars-per-day multiple). The batch path (build_all_regimes) passes frequency correctly, so Loop A normal generation and all D1 dossiers are unaffected; only standalone CLI H4 runs are wrong.
value_rationale: One-line fix; prevents a silent effective_n miscalculation for H4 dossiers built via the standalone CLI. Low value because the affected path is rarely used, but cheap and firewall-safe.
scope: Add frequency=args.frequency to the build_regime_dossiers(...) call in phase5/regime_stats.py main() (~L665)
Add/confirm a test asserting the CLI passes frequency through for an H4 asset
recommendation: Fix directly on a fresh branch off main; do NOT cherry-pick from feat/phase5-m3-v3.2 (the change would be smothered by B0154 conflicts). Firewall-safe: does not change feature content or dossier semantics for D1.
out_of_scope: Do not merge feat/phase5-m3-v3.2; its 4 commits are already in main or superseded (B0068 done).

history.reason: Fixed: CLI main() now passes frequency=args.frequency to build_regime_dossiers (phase5/regime_stats.py). TDD test tests/phase5/test_b0175_cli_frequency_kwarg.py. Full suite green.
